transcript.text:
(Grabs all the attention)
Isn’t that amazing?
Pretty people only eat this much!
That’s impossible, impossible
(Everyone seems astonished) How can she finish all that?
(Calling 911?) Call 911...
(Her mukbang makes people look for 911)
(All-time favorite Restaurant) It's my favorite gukbap* restaurant *Rice Soup
(I will give it a try)
(Eating gukbap with both hands cuz one isn’t enough)
(Instead of 911, all we need is thumbs up!!!)
This is amazing
(Thumbs up)
(Unstoppable series of thumbs up) It's the best
(Jangam, Uijeongbu, surrounded by green mountains and clear skies...)
Hello, everybody

I came to Jangam-dong, Uijeongbu today
(This is a gukbap place...?) There’s my favorite gukbap restaurant here
I've been here since I was 20 years old
Now they released frozen meal kits
So I keep it at home and eat it every day
It's spicy red beef gukbap
(Tzuyang’s TOP1 Gukbap Restaurant!) This is my favorite gukbap restaurant
I came here today to satisfy my cravings
(I'm here to satisfy some cravings) I've been wanting to eat this for a long time
(Uijeongbu, Gyeonggi Province, Korea) This place became so big
It was originally quite big though
(Tzuyang is already excited) I'll go inside
Whoosh whoosh
(Flirting that comes from nowhere) You’re too skinny, you look better in real life!
(The pleasant boss who recognizes Tzuyang!) What did you eat to become this pretty?
(The ambiance of the boss) You turned pretty from always eating a lot of delicious food

It's your first time shooting
- We don't accept any filming - Oh, really?
(Only Tzuyang is allowed to film here) But you're a regular, so it's all good
(So touching) Thank you!
(Let’s start ordering with gratitude and excitement) 2 bowls of original gukbap
One gomtang* and one galbitang** *Beef Bone Soup **Short Rib Soup
And one mulnaengmyeon* and one hoenaengmyeon**, please *Cold Buckwheat Noodles *Cold Buckwheat Noodles with Raw Fish
- I'd like a meatball, too. - Okay
Thank you
Their signature dish is the red gukbap
It’s really delicious
It’s salty yet has an addictive taste
(It's coming right up!)
(Deep and addictive taste of original gukbap)
(Gomtang with light broth)
(Naengmyeon with chewy, bouncy noodles)

(Sour and cold mulnaengmyeon)
(Spicy and chewy hoenaengmyeon)
(Meatballs that go well with gukbap)
(Foods that fill up the table)
(There's not enough space at the table...) What should I do...
- I'm sorry - It’s fine
(If you fill the empty space on the table...)
(A table of original gukbap is ready) It’s my first time trying the naengmyeon
and the galbitang here
I always ate the white gukbap and red gukbap
It’s my first time trying the meatball, too
I'm really looking forward to it
As I said, this is my favorite gukbap
This red gukbap is very thick
Just by looking at the broth, it looks very thick
Let’s try the broth first!

I can have 10 bowls, no joke
Wow, it's so delicious
I have a way to eat this
When I have gukbap, I cut up the ugeoji* *Korean Cabbage
(Bite size to swallow it easily) Cut it up finely
If you eat this way, the soup will go down smoothly
(Heart pounding even before eating♡) Looks delicious!
Bon appétit!
(Get a spoonful of warm gukbap...) Get one scoop
Wow, look at the big meat
Is it black rice?
Take it in the broth
(Impressive♡)
How can it be this good?
This has really strong seasoning
If you can’t handle strong seasoning,

ask for extra broth, they’ll give it to you
(Self-seasoning with hot broth) It'll taste better if you pour it in
The meatball is very famous, but I haven't tried it
So I'll give it a try!
It's a bit like fried meatballs
Somewhat different
I like it!
(Let’s try the naengmyeon!)
Let’s try the broth first
So tasty!
It tastes just like!
The ones at an expensive BBQ place
You know, these noodles?
I love this too
This chewy texture is like...
(An unexpected cheonsachae) cheonsachae*, it’s very chewy *Kelp noodles

(Naengmyeon noodles won’t end no matter how much she eats)
Where’s the end?
(One strand that does not let go of Tzuyang)
(Cuts)
I should cut it one more time, it’s too long!
Why is it so long?
Wow, it's so delicious!
And it's gone?!
(Where did all those noodles go...?) But the bowl was full of it
(They disappeared) Where did it all go?
I ate it all
This place also has great naengmyeon! I'll try the other menus, too
(A spoonful of galbitang soup)
It tastes like thick mushroom soup
Should I try some ribs?
Nobody’s watching, right?

Ribs taste best when you use your hands
(Exquisite chewy and soft ribs) So delicious!
Wow
Clean
After removing the bone,
cut it
(The filing galbitang is full of meat) There's a lot of meat
Let’s make a mini galbitang
Ah, amazing!
(A 26-year-old Tzu-man...) That sounded like my uncle... LOL
(The gukbap will work its magic) You can't help making those noises here
I'll get some white gukbap on top of here
There's a lot of meat here
It also comes with vermicelli here!
This isn’t white gukbap, it’s gomtang
Why did I think it was white gukbap?

Add a pinch of pepper
(And there's the pinch)
(Fails to season it) I should just pour it and mix it
Whatever...
(Belatedly regretting it) Why did I do that?
So stupid
I need to have kimchi with this
What have I been up to now?
(The perfect bite with a little bit of kimchi)
(Meanwhile inside...)
(How can she finish all that?) Impossible, impossible
With Tzuyang’s skills,
she can eat it over and over again
(Caution, the restaurant closes down before she gets full※) But we do have to close today
(Tzuyang diligently eats without knowing anything)
Oh, that’s awesome

How can it be this savory?
(Perfect with large pieces of meat)
Thumbs up-!!!
(Can't help giving the thumbs up) So delicious! Thumbs up!
(So warm) The boss warmed it up for me
Gukbap must be hot
Get a big one
Plop!
I love to chop everything up in the gukbap
This place has the best gukbap!
Should I say that I always end up here?
When I find delicious gukbap, I tend to be obsessed with that for a while
But in the end, I always come back here!
(Tzuyang's final gukbap destination) It feels like family to me
(Tries out the galbitang)
(Tears and tears again)

(I can't stand it anymore) I can't do this
(Speed UP with the help of the left arm) The left arm only helps!
(Infinite spiral of kkakdugi*+ gukbap...) *Diced Radish Kimchi
(Kkakdugi goes in with no breaks!!)
I’m too focused on eating
(Inhaling the food)
(How can she eat so well...?)
(Gukbap tastes best when you drink it) I need to drink it!
(Can’t take their eyes off of her...)
This is amazing
Do you think we can eat like that?
Isn’t it amazing?
How can she finish all that?!
She’s so skinny, can't believe she got room for all that
Pretty people only eat this much!
She's pretty, but she also eats well!

(And that's what makes her pretty)
The spicy one!
Wow, so many noodles
(Approximately 3 servings...) I think this is a jumbo+jumbo size
I’ll mix it all up hehe
(The seasoning is evenly distributed, making it look more delicious)
(Looks like she’s really going to eat it all...)
Wow! Absolutely delicious
Pollock!
(You can't leave out the broth from the spicy noodles) Naengmyeon restaurant has amazing warm broth!
(Let’s cut it and try with the naengmyeon)
(Tzuyang succeeds with another combination!) It goes well, it's delicious
The oil has been drained
(The chemistry with the meatballs) It's savory and light, so it goes very well with these things
I’ll clear this one first...
(Warmth that warms even the heart) The boss warmed this up for me

Amazing!
Let’s drink up the broth
I need to eat rice, I can't stand it
(Even adds the last grain of rice...)
I'll show you my two-handed skills
(Loading...)
(The patch is done)
(Serious with her gukbap) I need to eat one more
(This time she just dumped it in...)
Grab a spoon in the right hand
Pick it up with tongs
Then you can eat incredibly fast
(Perfect skill application)
(Now it's time to eat the original gukbap that she saved up)
(Tzuyang suddenly explodes in laughter...?)
(I love you, Tzuyang♡)

(Me too, boss♡)
Should I call 911?
I’m fine...!
(Thumbs up! Thumbs up!)
(Resumes to her mukbang after receiving lots of love from the boss) I think it would be delicious if I dip it in here
Soaking it in the broth makes it even better
(Let’s properly add the rice...) I love it! Looks delicious!
I haven't eaten yet, but it's delicious already
This gukbap has its own unique savory taste
(This restaurant has its own unique taste) I've never tasted anything like this
(A dance that comes out naturally from the hot food)
(※ Beware of heat) It's too hot, so I’ll put it here a bit
So delicious
(It melts in the mouth) The meat is also very soft
(Intense savory taste of deep and thick broth) It’s really thick and tastes great
(Cuts the remaining meatballs wildly)

In fact, gukbap restaurants
are almost empty expect during
lunch and dinner, right?
But this place is packed with a line of customers
(More and more customers are entering) They keep coming in
(The spoon's working all day...)
Let’s finish it in the stone pot
I wish I had one in front of my house
(She’s obsessed with the main branch) I want to open up a branch
It’s so delicious
This can't get better for me
Wow, I ate so well!
(Clean)
Wow, did you really empty it?
- (Shy) - Great, great!
It was so yummy...

But you also eat so well!
(Almost like a rabbit eating grass...) You chew like this, nom nom nom
- I ate very voraciously today haha... - (Absolutely not)
- Thank you - Thanks for the hard work!
Thanks for the amazing food!
Actually, I don't eat the soup
I didn't know if I’ll empty the soup completely
Although the portion was huge,
(I ate already, but I want more) it was so delicious that I couldn’t realize that I’m full
So I just ate it up to the bottom hehe
So, anyways!
I really enjoyed the meal!
(Staff's endless support and love♡)
(Replied with empty bowls) It'll be easy to do the dishes!
(It was too delicious...) Thank you for cleaning it all up
(Thanks for the great meal!)
